items.text: He locked us up because you stole his case?

items.comment: (picking up enthusiasm because even though notes are not gold, they have juicy gossip etc)
items.text:
Little notes tell you a lot about people, you know?
Reading between the lines.

I wanted to know who this guy really was.
So I read them.

We should have never taken this job,
or maybe we should have -- as we did --
because if we didn't,

we wouldn't know what we know,
which is, we have to stop him.
